items.title: West Bengal Assembly polls Phase 2 LIVE: Approximately 18.39% voting recorded till 9 a.m., says ECI
items.summary: Incidents of violence and vandalism reported from multiple locations in West Bengal, including Chapra, Shantipur, Nimtala and Bhangar, during the early hours of voting

items.title: Student uses space cosmic rays to make photographs
items.summary: Blank negative photographic film sealed in a bag is sent to edge of space using a helium balloon.
